case_title: KZV ARMENIAN SCHOOL VS. ALEXANDER TATISHVILI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KZV ARMENIAN SCHOOL AS TO DEFENDANT TATISHVILI, ALEXANDER TATISHVILI, MARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ALEXANDER TATISHVILI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-04-2014 AT 8:30 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ALEXANDER TATISHVILI WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ABRAHAM PANOSSIAN--BOARD MEMBER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT ALEXANDER TATISHVILI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KZV ARMENIAN SCHOOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TATISHVILI, MARINA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,185.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ALEXANDER TATISHVILI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED. ALEXANDER TATISHVILI DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
APPEARANCES:
Abraham Panossian/Board Member appears for KZV ARMENIAN SCHOOL, Plaintiff/Respondent.
Marina Tatishvili, Defendant/Appellant appears as Propria Persona; no appearance by Alexander Tatishvili.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties, Previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Morgan Prickett.

The parties informed the Court that they have come to agreement on the Small Claims Judgment that Appellant, Marina Tatishvili agree to pay respondent $100.00 each month until the total judgment is paid.

9:30am: Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Judgment Entered
